javascript:!function()%7B%22use%20strict%22%3Bfunction%20extractTabular(data)%7Bif(!Array.isArray(data)%7C%7C0%3D%3D%3Ddata.length)return%20null%3Bif(%22object%22!%3Dtypeof%20data%5B0%5D%7C%7Cnull%3D%3D%3Ddata%5B0%5D%7C%7CArray.isArray(data%5B0%5D))return%20null%3Bconst%20headerSet%3Dnew%20Set%3Bfor(const%20row%20of%20data)%7Bif(%22object%22!%3Dtypeof%20row%7C%7Cnull%3D%3D%3Drow%7C%7CArray.isArray(row))return%20null%3Bfor(const%20key%20of%20Object.keys(row))headerSet.add(key)%7Dconst%20headers%3DArray.from(headerSet)%2Crows%3Ddata.map(obj%3D%3Eheaders.map(h%3D%3Evoid%200!%3D%3Dobj%5Bh%5D%3Fobj%5Bh%5D%3Anull))%3Breturn%7Bheaders%3Aheaders%2Crows%3Arows%7D%7Dasync%20function%20unzip(arrayBuffer)%7Bfor(var%20bytes%3Dnew%20Uint8Array(arrayBuffer)%2Cview%3Dnew%20DataView(arrayBuffer)%2Centries%3Dnew%20Map%2Coffset%3D0%3Boffset%2B30%3C%3Dbytes.length%26%2667324752%3D%3D%3Dview.getUint32(offset%2C!0)%3B)%7Bvar%20decompressed%2Ccompression%3Dview.getUint16(offset%2B8%2C!0)%2CcompSize%3Dview.getUint32(offset%2B18%2C!0)%2CnameLen%3D(view.getUint32(offset%2B22%2C!0)%2Cview.getUint16(offset%2B26%2C!0))%2CextraLen%3Dview.getUint16(offset%2B28%2C!0)%2CnameBytes%3Dbytes.subarray(offset%2B30%2Coffset%2B30%2BnameLen)%2Cfilename%3D(new%20TextDecoder).decode(nameBytes)%2CdataStart%3Doffset%2B30%2BnameLen%2BextraLen%2CcompData%3Dbytes.subarray(dataStart%2CdataStart%2BcompSize)%3Bif(0%3D%3D%3Dcompression)decompressed%3DcompData.slice()%3Belse%7Bif(8!%3D%3Dcompression)throw%20new%20Error(%22ZIP%3A%20unsupported%20compression%20method%20%22%2Bcompression%2B'%20in%20%22'%2Bfilename%2B'%22')%3Bdecompressed%3Dawait%20_inflateRaw(compData)%7Dentries.set(filename%2Cdecompressed)%2Coffset%3DdataStart%2BcompSize%7Dif(0%3D%3D%3Dentries.size)throw%20new%20Error(%22ZIP%3A%20no%20entries%20found%20%E2%80%94%20is%20this%20a%20valid%20ZIP%20file%3F%22)%3Breturn%20entries%7Dasync%20function%20_inflateRaw(data%2CexpectedSize)%7Bvar%20ds%3Dnew%20DecompressionStream(%22deflate-raw%22)%2Cwriter%3Dds.writab i%5D)if(%22()%2C*.%22.indexOf(sql%5Bi%5D)%3E%3D0)tokens.push(sql%5Bi%5D)%2Ci%2B%2B%3Belse%20if(%22!%22!%3D%3Dsql%5Bi%5D%7C%7C%22%3D%22!%3D%3Dsql%5Bi%2B1%5D)if(%22%3C%22!%3D%3Dsql%5Bi%5D%7C%7C%22%3D%22!%3D%3Dsql%5Bi%2B1%5D)if(%22%3E%22!%3D%3Dsql%5Bi%5D%7C%7C%22%3D%22!%3D%3Dsql%5Bi%2B1%5D)if(%22%3C%3E%3D%2C%22.indexOf(sql%5Bi%5D)%3E%3D0)tokens.push(sql%5Bi%5D)%2Ci%2B%2B%3Belse%7Bfor(var%20start%3Di%3Bi%3Csql.length%26%26!%2F%5B%5Cs()%2C%3C%3E%3D!%2C.%5D%2F.test(sql%5Bi%5D)%26%26%22'%22!%3D%3Dsql%5Bi%5D%3B)i%2B%2B%3Bi%3Estart%26%26tokens.push(sql.substring(start%2Ci))%7Delse%20tokens.push(%22%3E%3D%22)%2Ci%2B%3D2%3Belse%20tokens.push(%22%3C%3D%22)%2Ci%2B%3D2%3Belse%20tokens.push(%22!%3D%22)%2Ci%2B%3D2%3Belse%7Bfor(var%20j%3Di%2B1%3Bj%3Csql.length%26%26%22'%22!%3D%3Dsql%5Bj%5D%3B)j%2B%2B%3Btokens.push(sql.substring(i%2Cj%2B1))%2Ci%3Dj%2B1%7Dreturn%20tokens%7Dfunction%20applyOrderBy(rows%2CorderBy%2Cheaders)%7Bvar%20specs%3DorderBy.map(function(o)%7Bvar%20idx%3Dheaders.indexOf(o.column)%3Bif(-1%3D%3D%3Didx)throw%20new%20Error('ORDER%20BY%3A%20column%20%22'%2Bo.column%2B'%22%20not%20found')%3Breturn%7Bidx%3Aidx%2Casc%3A%22asc%22%3D%3D%3Do.dir%7D%7D)%3Breturn%20rows.slice().sort(function(a%2Cb)%7Bfor(var%20s%3D0%3Bs%3Cspecs.length%3Bs%2B%2B)%7Bvar%20spec%3Dspecs%5Bs%5D%2Cva%3Da%5Bspec.idx%5D%2Cvb%3Db%5Bspec.idx%5D%2Cna%3DNumber(va)%2Cnb%3DNumber(vb)%3Bif(isNaN(na)%7C%7CisNaN(nb)%7C%7C(va%3Dna%2Cvb%3Dnb)%2Cva%3Cvb)return%20spec.asc%3F-1%3A1%3Bif(va%3Evb)return%20spec.asc%3F1%3A-1%7Dreturn%200%7D)%7Dfunction%20escapeCSV(value%2Cdelimiter)%7Bif(null%3D%3Dvalue)return%22%22%3Bconst%20str%3DString(value)%3Breturn%20str.includes(delimiter)%7C%7Cstr.includes('%22')%7C%7Cstr.includes(%22%5Cn%22)%7C%7Cstr.includes(%22%5Cr%22)%3F'%22'%2Bstr.replace(%2F%22%2Fg%2C'%22%22')%2B'%22'%3Astr%7Dfunction%20downloadBlob(content%2Cfilename%2CmimeType%3D%22text%2Fplain%22)%7Bconst%20blob%3Dnew%20Blob(%5Bcontent%5D%2C%7Btype%3AmimeType%7D)%2Curl%3DURL.createObjectURL(blob)%2Ca%3Ddocument.createElement(%22a%22)%3Ba.href%3Durl%2Ca.download%3Dfilename%2Ca.style.display%3D%22none%22%2Cdocument.body.appendChild(a)%2Ca.click()%2Cdocument.body.removeChild(a)%2CURL.revokeObjectURL(url)%7D%22undefined%22!%3Dtypeof%20module%26%26module.exports%26%26(module.exports%3D%7BloadPIIPatterns%3Afunction(patternsJson)%7BDK_PII_PATTERNS%3DpatternsJson.patterns.map(function(p)%7Breturn%7Bname%3Ap.name%2Centity_type%3Ap.entity_type%2Cseverity%3Ap.severity%2Cregex%3Anew%20RegExp(p.regex%2C%22gi%22)%2Cscore%3Ap.score%2Ccontext_words%3Ap.context_words%7C%7C%5B%5D%2Ccontext_score_boost%3Ap.context_score_boost%7C%7C0%2Cvalidation%3Ap.validation%2Cdescription%3Ap.description%7D%7D)%7D%2CscanPII%3Afunction(df%2Coptions)%7Bif(!DK_PII_PATTERNS)throw%20new%20Error(%22PII%20patterns%20not%20loaded.%20Call%20loadPIIPatterns()%20first.%22)%3Bvar%20opts%3Doptions%7C%7C%7B%7D%2CminScore%3Dnull!%3Dopts.minScore%3Fopts.minScore%3A.5%2CseverityFilter%3Dopts.severities%7C%7Cnull%2Cfindings%3D%5B%5D%2Csummary%3D%7B%7D%2Cheaders%3Ddf._headers%2Crows%3Ddf._rows%3BDK_PII_PATTERNS.forEach(function(p)%7Bsummary%5Bp.name%5D%3D%7Bcount%3A0%2Cseverity%3Ap.severity%2Centity_type%3Ap.entity_type%7D%7D)%3Bfor(var%20r%3D0%3Br%3Crows.length%3Br%2B%2B)for(var%20row%3Drows%5Br%5D%2Cc%3D0%3Bc%3Cheaders.length%3Bc%2B%2B)%7Bvar%20cellVal%3Drow%5Bc%5D%3Bif(null!%3DcellVal%26%26%22%22!%3D%3DcellVal)for(var%20cellStr%3DString(cellVal)%2Cp%3D0%3Bp%3CDK_PII_PATTERNS.length%3Bp%2B%2B)%7Bvar%20pattern%3DDK_PII_PATTERNS%5Bp%5D%3Bif(!(severityFilter%26%26severityFilter.indexOf(pattern.severity)%3C0))%7Bpattern.regex.lastIndex%3D0%3Bvar%20match%3Dpattern.regex.exec(cellStr)%3Bif(match)%7Bvar%20score%3Dpattern.score%3Bif(%22luhn%22%3D%3D%3Dpattern.validation)%7Bif(!validateLuhn(match%5B0%5D))continue%3Bscore%2B%3D.15%7Delse%20if(%22ssn_area_check%22%3D%3D%3Dpattern.validation)%7Bif(!validateSSN(match%5B0%5D))continue%3Bscore%2B%3D.1%7DhasContextMatch(row.join(%22%20%22)%2Cpattern.context_words)%26%26(score%2B%3Dpattern.contex ).split(%22.%22)%3Breturn%20parts.length%3C2%3F%22%22%3Aparts%5Bparts.length-1%5D.toLowerCase()%7Dfunction%20dkScanFormatBytes(bytes)%7Bif(0%3D%3D%3Dbytes)return%220%20B%22%3Bfor(var%20units%3D%5B%22B%22%2C%22KB%22%2C%22MB%22%2C%22GB%22%5D%2Ci%3D0%2Cval%3Dbytes%3Bval%3E%3D1024%26%26i%3Cunits.length-1%3B)val%2F%3D1024%2Ci%2B%2B%3Breturn(0%3D%3D%3Di%3Fval%3Aval.toFixed(1))%2B%22%20%22%2Bunits%5Bi%5D%7Dfunction%20dkScanHash(buffer)%7Breturn%22undefined%22!%3Dtypeof%20crypto%26%26crypto.subtle%26%26crypto.subtle.digest%3Fcrypto.subtle.digest(%22SHA-256%22%2Cbuffer).then(function(hashBuf)%7Bfor(var%20arr%3Dnew%20Uint8Array(hashBuf)%2Chex%3D%22%22%2Ci%3D0%3Bi%3Carr.length%3Bi%2B%2B)%7Bvar%20h%3Darr%5Bi%5D.toString(16)%3Bhex%2B%3D(1%3D%3D%3Dh.length%3F%220%22%3A%22%22)%2Bh%7Dreturn%20hex%7D)%3APromise.resolve(null)%7Dfunction%20dkScanEntropy(str)%7Bif(!str%7C%7C0%3D%3D%3Dstr.length)return%200%3Bfor(var%20freq%3D%7B%7D%2Clen%3Dstr.length%2Ci%3D0%3Bi%3Clen%3Bi%2B%2B)%7Bvar%20ch%3Dstr%5Bi%5D%3Bfreq%5Bch%5D%3D(freq%5Bch%5D%7C%7C0)%2B1%7Dfor(var%20entropy%3D0%2Ckeys%3DObject.keys(freq)%2Ck%3D0%3Bk%3Ckeys.length%3Bk%2B%2B)%7Bvar%20p%3Dfreq%5Bkeys%5Bk%5D%5D%2Flen%3Bp%3E0%26%26(entropy-%3Dp*(Math.log(p)%2FMath.LN2))%7Dreturn%20entropy%7Dfunction%20dkScanEscapeHTML(str)%7Breturn%20String(str).replace(%2F%26%2Fg%2C%22%26amp%3B%22).replace(%2F%3C%2Fg%2C%22%26lt%3B%22).replace(%2F%3E%2Fg%2C%22%26gt%3B%22).replace(%2F%22%2Fg%2C%22%26quot%3B%22).replace(%2F'%2Fg%2C%22%26%23039%3B%22)%7Dfunction%20dkScanCSVField(val)%7Bvar%20s%3DString(null%3D%3Dval%3F%22%22%3Aval)%3Breturn%20s.indexOf(%22%2C%22)%3E%3D0%7C%7Cs.indexOf('%22')%3E%3D0%7C%7Cs.indexOf(%22%5Cn%22)%3E%3D0%3F'%22'%2Bs.replace(%2F%22%2Fg%2C'%22%22')%2B'%22'%3As%7Dfunction%20dkScanBuildCSV(headers%2Crows)%7Bfor(var%20lines%3D%5Bheaders.map(dkScanCSVField).join(%22%2C%22)%5D%2Ci%3D0%3Bi%3Crows.length%3Bi%2B%2B)lines.push(rows%5Bi%5D.map(dkScanCSVField).join(%22%2C%22))%3Breturn%20lines.join(%22%5Cn%22)%7Dfunction%20dkScanCheckConte %5D%2Ci%3D0%3Bi%3Cstr.length%3Bi%2B%2B)%7Bvar%20code%3Dstr.charCodeAt(i)%3Bcode%3C128%3Farr.push(code)%3Acode%3C2048%3Farr.push(192%7Ccode%3E%3E6%2C128%7C63%26code)%3Aarr.push(224%7Ccode%3E%3E12%2C128%7Ccode%3E%3E6%2663%2C128%7C63%26code)%7Dreturn%20new%20Uint8Array(arr)%7Dvar%20dkScanCRC32Table%3Dnull%3Bfunction%20dkScanCRC32(data)%7Bif(!dkScanCRC32Table)%7BdkScanCRC32Table%3Dnew%20Uint32Array(256)%3Bfor(var%20n%3D0%3Bn%3C256%3Bn%2B%2B)%7Bfor(var%20c%3Dn%2Ck%3D0%3Bk%3C8%3Bk%2B%2B)c%3D1%26c%3F3988292384%5Ec%3E%3E%3E1%3Ac%3E%3E%3E1%3BdkScanCRC32Table%5Bn%5D%3Dc%7D%7Dfor(var%20crc%3D4294967295%2Ci%3D0%3Bi%3Cdata.length%3Bi%2B%2B)crc%3DdkScanCRC32Table%5B255%26(crc%5Edata%5Bi%5D)%5D%5Ecrc%3E%3E%3E8%3Breturn(4294967295%5Ecrc)%3E%3E%3E0%7Dfunction%20dkScanDownloadResults(results%2Cconverted)%7Bvar%20zipEntries%3D%7B%7D%3BzipEntries%5B%22manifest.csv%22%5D%3DdkScanManifestCSV(results%2Cconverted)%2CzipEntries%5B%22warnings.csv%22%5D%3DdkScanWarningsCSV(results)%2CzipEntries%5B%22scan-report.html%22%5D%3DdkScanReportHTML(results%2Cconverted)%3Bfor(var%20i%3D0%3Bi%3Cresults.length%3Bi%2B%2B)%7Bvar%20r%3Dresults%5Bi%5D%2Ctext%3Dr._text%7C%7C%22%22%2Cext%3DdkScanGetExt(r.name)%3Bif(converted)%7Bvar%20outName%3DdkScanConvertName(r.name)%2CoutContent%3DdkScanConvert(text%2Cext%2Cr.name)%3BzipEntries%5B%22files%2F%22%2BoutName%5D%3DoutContent%7Delse%20zipEntries%5B%22files%2F%22%2Br.name%5D%3Dtext%7Dvar%20blob%2Cfilename%2Curl%2Ca%2CzipBytes%3DdkScanBuildZip(zipEntries)%3Bblob%3Dnew%20Blob(%5BzipBytes%5D%2C%7Btype%3A%22application%2Fzip%22%7D)%2Cfilename%3D%22preflight-scan-%22%2B(new%20Date).toISOString().replace(%2F%5B%3A.%5D%2Fg%2C%22-%22).substring(0%2C19)%2B%22.zip%22%2Curl%3DURL.createObjectURL(blob)%2C(a%3Ddocument.createElement(%22a%22)).href%3Durl%2Ca.download%3Dfilename%2Cdocument.body.appendChild(a)%2Ca.click()%2Cdocument.body.removeChild(a)%2CsetTimeout(function()%7BURL.revokeObjectURL(url)%7D%2C1e3)%7Dfunction%20createScannerPanel(container)%7B!function()%7Bif(!docu
